programs.programName: Visually Impaired Seniors In-Home Outreach and Networking Services (VISIONS)
WV Bureau of Senior Services Home Modification and Accessibility Grant Program (Aging Well, Safe at Home Initiative)

verified.notes: Program confirmed active as of 2026. Age requirement is 60+ for seniors. No income or asset limits found in authoritative sources. Phone number is for WV Aging & Disability Resource Center (ADRC), the official intake point for applications. Maximum grant amount is $3,000 per source https://search.wv211.org/detail/?idServiceAtLocation=211charles-c315c0dd-562e-4918-a149-1b7801f1b3fb&idService=211charles-4641e1bf-8b4a-44b7-a19c-5c5bc19f63ec&idOrganization=211charles-359533b9-dbb7-43ba-bc45-2251dce0193a&idLocation=211charles-d37e5e0a-0f55-4574-99e0-a951b1e80f89&location=Morgantown++WV++United+States&distance=10&adv=-1
